note: SYNTHESIZED from ST 1.18.0 new-engine source (definitions/variable-macros.js). Pins the classic scoped-variable set {{setvar}}/{{addvar}}/{{getvar}} that RPT supports: setvar/addvar render empty and mutate the shared store; getvar reads it. The new engine's variable-SHORTHAND operators ({{.hp++}}, {{$g||=x}}) are NOT in RPT's profile — recorded in KNOWN-DIVERGENCES.md. Prose RPT-authored + scrambled. rptAdapter unwired (issues 11-15).

input.description: Main block sets, increments, then reads a scoped variable.
